item.title: From Scrap to a BT50 Tool Holder
item.description: Scrap material gets transformed into a custom BT50 tool holder through careful machining and workshop creativity. How much precision goes into making tooling from scratch?

media:content.media:title: From Scrap to a BT50 Tool Holder
media:content.media:description: Scrap material gets transformed into a custom BT50 tool holder through careful machining and workshop creativity. How much precision goes into making tooling from scratch?

item.title: Testing the new I450 Arc Spray Machine
item.description: The new I450 arc spray machine gets its first real workshop test to evaluate coating performance and repair capabilities. How effective is arc spraying for restoring worn parts?

media:content.media:title: Testing the new I450 Arc Spray Machine
media:content.media:description: The new I450 arc spray machine gets its first real workshop test to evaluate coating performance and repair capabilities. How effective is arc spraying for restoring worn parts?

item.title: Milling a Robot Stand on the Jig Borer
item.description: Precision milling work on a jig borer is used to create a sturdy and accurate stand for robotic equipment. Why are jig borers still valued for high-precision work?

media:content.media:title: Milling a Robot Stand on the Jig Borer
media:content.media:description: Precision milling work on a jig borer is used to create a sturdy and accurate stand for robotic equipment. Why are jig borers still valued for high-precision work?

item.title: Workshop Pump Rebuild Challenge
item.description: Unexpected issues and precision work turn a routine pump rebuild into a demanding workshop challenge. What problems show up once the teardown begins?

media:content.media:title: Workshop Pump Rebuild Challenge
media:content.media:description: Unexpected issues and precision work turn a routine pump rebuild into a demanding workshop challenge. What problems show up once the teardown begins?

item.title: CAT 651 Cylinder Re-Barrel
item.description: Major hydraulic repair work begins as a CAT 651 scraper cylinder receives a new barrel to restore strength and functionality. How challenging is re-barreling components this large?

media:content.media:title: CAT 651 Cylinder Re-Barrel
media:content.media:description: Major hydraulic repair work begins as a CAT 651 scraper cylinder receives a new barrel to restore strength and functionality. How challenging is re-barreling components this large?

item.title: Workshop Reorganization Begins
item.description: The workshop gets reorganized and cleared out in preparation for a major new machine or equipment delivery. What’s arriving next?

media:content.media:title: Workshop Reorganization Begins
media:content.media:description: The workshop gets reorganized and cleared out in preparation for a major new machine or equipment delivery. What’s arriving next?

item.title: Bulldozer Trunnion Build
item.description: Heavy-duty fabrication and machining come together to produce a brand-new trunnion for a bulldozer repair. What kind of stress do components like this handle daily?

media:content.media:title: Bulldozer Trunnion Build
media:content.media:description: Heavy-duty fabrication and machining come together to produce a brand-new trunnion for a bulldozer repair. What kind of stress do components like this handle daily?

item.title: Custom Drawbar Bolt Machining
item.description: A custom through-spindle coolant drawbar bolt is machined for improved tooling and coolant flow in precision machining operations. Why is through-spindle coolant so useful in machining?

media:content.media:title: Custom Drawbar Bolt Machining
media:content.media:description: A custom through-spindle coolant drawbar bolt is machined for improved tooling and coolant flow in precision machining operations. Why is through-spindle coolant so useful in machining?

item.title: Seized Clevis Repair Breakdown
item.description: A detailed look at the process of repairing a seized clevis component through machining, heat, and precision restoration work. What causes heavy components like this to seize over time?

media:content.media:title: Seized Clevis Repair Breakdown
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at the process of repairing a seized clevis component through machining, heat, and precision restoration work. What causes heavy components like this to seize over time?

item.title: Machining New Bushings from Polyurethane
item.description: New bushings are machined from polyurethane to improve durability and performance in heavy equipment applications. What makes polyurethane ideal for wear components?

media:content.media:title: Machining New Bushings from Polyurethane
media:content.media:description: New bushings are machined from polyurethane to improve durability and performance in heavy equipment applications. What makes polyurethane ideal for wear components?

item.title: Restoring the A-Frame Eye on a Caterpillar 745
item.description: The A-frame eye on a Caterpillar 745 is restored through machining and welding to ensure safe operation. Why are structural eyes critical on haul trucks?

media:content.media:title: Restoring the A-Frame Eye on a Caterpillar 745
media:content.media:description: The A-frame eye on a Caterpillar 745 is restored through machining and welding to ensure safe operation. Why are structural eyes critical on haul trucks?

item.title: Heavy-Duty Tailstock Chuck for a Megabore Lathe
item.description: A custom heavy-duty tailstock chuck is designed and fitted for a megabore lathe system. What precision challenges come with large-scale machining tools?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Tailstock Chuck for a Megabore Lathe
media:content.media:description: A custom heavy-duty tailstock chuck is designed and fitted for a megabore lathe system. What precision challenges come with large-scale machining tools?

item.title: 90-Tonne Excavator Tilt Bracket Repair
item.description: A massive tilt bracket on a 90-tonne excavator undergoes repair and reinforcement to restore structural integrity. How do you handle repairs at this scale?

media:content.media:description: A massive tilt bracket on a 90-tonne excavator undergoes repair and reinforcement to restore structural integrity. How do you handle repairs at this scale?

item.title: Inspecting an Excavator Track Idler Wear Issue
item.description: An excavator track idler is inspected for wear and damage to determine repair or replacement needs. What signs indicate a failing undercarriage component?

item.title: Getting Started on CAT 140M Grader Repairs
item.description: Initial repair work begins on a CAT 140M motor grader, focusing on diagnostics and early-stage disassembly. What are the first steps in grader maintenance?
